channel.title: Captcha on OpenSwap Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Captcha on OpenSwap Guide

item.title: Best Self-Hosted CAPTCHA Alternatives to Google reCAPTCHA 2026
item.description: Every website with a public-facing form faces the same problem: how do you tell humans from bots without making legitimate users suffer through impossible image puzzles? For over a decade, Google reCAPTCHA has been the default answer. But reCAPTCHA tracks users across the web, sends behavioral data to Google’s servers, and adds third-party network requests to every page it appears on.
